structured.title: Birthday Dinner Plans in Whitchurch
structured.overview: The conversation focuses on a planned Friday birthday dinner in Whitchurch, apparently at a posh bistro. The group discusses who is coming, including Omi and Kate, and there is surprise around the guest list. A practical issue dominates the talk: parking. The speaker worries there is nowhere to park near the restaurant, so they look up nearby parking options and identify a car park a few minutes away that would allow them to cut through to the venue. The overall tone is casual and mildly frustrated, but the location and logistics seem mostly sorted.

apps_results.content:
## Birthday meal plans
- Friday dinner in Whitchurch
- Mom booked a posh bistro
- Possible 14th birthday meal

## Guests and surprise issue
- Omi and Kate may come
- Surprise bothered someone
- Surprises are not liked

## Parking concerns
- No nearby parking available
- Street parking seemed unlikely
- Looked for a car park

## Car park found
- Distant car park found
- About 3-minute drive or walk
- Could cut through there

## Location notes
- Area is near a wanted restaurant
- Whitchurch looks nice overall
- Parking situation still awkward

## Next steps
- Confirm exact meal details
- Use the distant car park
- Drop mom outside if needed
